items.title: Melania Trump says it’s ‘heartbreaking’ to watch teens grapple with revenge porn
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Melania Trump was on Capitol Hill Monday to lend her support to an online safety bill that is designed to speed the removal of revenge porn, which is intimate imagery posted online without an individual's consent. Read more: https://bit.ly/4koD1vN

items.title: Netanyahu: 'If you don't release our hostages, there will be consequences you can't imagine'
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu on Monday warned Hamas that if the remaining Israeli hostages are not released “there will be consequences you can't imagine.”

items.title: Mexico's president awaits Trump's decision to impose 25% tariffs on imports
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Mexico President Claudia Sheinbaum said Monday that her administration was waiting to see if U.S. President Donald Trump goes ahead with plans to impose a 25% tariff on Mexican imports. Read more: https://bit.ly/43qcJUd

items.title: Zelenskyy says end of the war with Russia is ‘very, very far away’
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy said on Sunday that an "agreement to end the war is still very, very far away." Speaking at a briefing in London, Zelenskyy said that a future foreign contingent in Ukraine "should include the presence of the United States of America in one way or another." Read more: https://bit.ly/3QHClnW 

#news #zelenskyy #ukraine 
Photo credit: The Canadian Press

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

items.title: Driver rams car into crowd in Germany, leaving 2 dead and others injured
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>A driver rammed a car into a crowd Monday in the southwestern German city of Mannheim, killing one person and injuring several others, police said as they asked the public to stay away from the downtown area and remain in their homes. A suspect was in custody, police said. Read more: https://bit.ly/3DiDmzF 

#germany #news 
Photo credit: DPA

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

items.content:
<article>Watch live as the Senate votes on whether to confirm former wrestling executive Linda McMahon as the nation's education chief, a role placing her atop a department President Donald Trump has vowed to dismantle. Read more: https://bit.ly/3Xq6X0J

items.title: Pope appears to be overcoming a setback in his recovery from pneumonia
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Pope Francis was up and receiving therapy on Monday after apparently overcoming a setback in his recovery from pneumonia. The Vatican said he is stable, off mechanical ventilation and is showing no sign of new infection following a respiratory crisis late last week. Read more: https://bit.ly/4h34IaJ

#popefrancis #vatican #news

items.title: LIVE: View from Gaza after Israel cuts off aid
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Watch live view from Gaza City as Israel faces sharp criticism after barring the entry of all food and other supplies into Gaza. Israel says there will be additional consequences if Hamas doesn’t accept what it calls a U.S. proposal for a ceasefire extension. Mediators Egypt and Qatar accused Israel of violating humanitarian law by using starvation as a weapon. Read more here: https://bit.ly/4h0Tjbn

#gaza #palestinian #live</article>
